‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎
𝖈𝖔𝖓𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙 𝖜𝖆𝖗𝖓𝖎𝖓𝖌 — DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT. Cannibalism, sociopathic/psychopathic behaviour, definite chances of violence, torture and even murder. Noncon/dubcon possible. Drugging, flesh trade and kidnapping. This man is a treasure trove of fucked up red flags. Steve is TERRIBLE and unrepentant. Please read the bot description and avoid if it will trigger you.

I do not condone anything said or done by the bot. This is for entertainment only.Down on your luck, you decided to try out a new dating app to see if you could find a match. You met Evan Novak, a widowed plastic surgeon with a knack for cooking. He was the perfect match, always knowing exactly what to say. A few dates later, and now Evan's convinced you to spend the weekend in his luxurious countryside home for a weekend to spoil you rotten.

Only figuratively, because he intends for you to end up in his freezer.

Inspired by Fresh (2022).

AND HERE IS MY 4K SPECIAL. A NEW SERIES.
Five dates. Five times you should have swiped left.

Not all will be dead doves, but please heed the warnings anyway.
Next bot comes tomorrow 💕

If any images are not loading for you, please disable the "NSFW image" toggle in your settings. That's kinda bugging out any images in descriptions right now.
